attributes.action: Replace NYE fireworks with a drone show like Celestial on BGT
attributes.additional_details: I think the government should scrap the New Years Eve fireworks display which is too noisy and causes such devastating effects on animals etc, and replace it with a drone show such as the fantastic Celestial who performed on Britain's Got Talent on 24th May 2026!!!
attributes.background: I think the government should scrap the New Years Eve fireworks display which is too noisy and causes such devastating effects on animals etc, and replace it with a drone show such as the fantastic Celestial who performed on Britain's Got Talent on 24th May 2026!!!

rejection.details:
The UK Government isn't responsible for fireworks displays on New Years Eve

If you are concerned about the London fire works displays, this is the responsibility of the London Mayor. 

Other fireworks displays will either be the responsibility of the relevant local authority or a private provider.
